Client 2: I always mix that up. I think that’s like… everything? But the mortgage is its own thing too.

Client 2: No, nothing else like that.

Client 1: Yes—joint taxable, held on an advisor platform. That one is 356150.

Client 1: NC.

Client 2: It’s around twenty-five thousand a year—give or take.

Client 2: Operations. I’m in operations.

Client 1: Good. And I want to see the guardrails spelled out—like what we’d actually do, not just the chart.
Advisor: Totally fair, Davi—guardrails in plain English, not just a Monte Carlo blob. Before I sketch those, I want to make sure I’ve got Mary’s work and income details right since that drives taxes and cash flow.

Advisor: Got it. And just so I label things correctly in my notes—between the two of you, Davi is Client 1 and you’re Client 2, right, Mary?
